body_html:
that is fine I will help you with school finances ,,
you should follow your dream

--- kellens@earthlink.net wrote:

-----Forwarded Message-----

From: balerina simona balerinasimona@hotmail.com
Sent: Jul 31, 2006 6:20 AM
To: kellens@earthlink.net
Subject: simona from lithuania

Dear Sarahy, please send it to Jeffrey.It is
very important for me.

Thank you.

Dear Jeffrey,
how are you ? I realy would like to thank you for
all your hospitality and
generosity you showed to me during my time in USA.
Before i come back to USA I would like to apply
for admission to dance
school in Geneva.it is private school
(www.geneva-dance-center.ch). I would
like to continue my studies.
It' has an excellant reputation and specialist in
areas beyond classical
ballet. I believe it will help me expand my skills
and give me greater
entree into other areas of dance.I would like to
stay there for few months.
This will be an expensive school for me and housing
prises in Geneva too.
Perhaps you know of someone living in Geneva how
has a space beddroom for
me to use.
I care about your appinion very much. Please,
let me know if you can help
me. I miss you. I hope to see you soon.

Dear Jeffrey,
how are you ? I realy would like to thank you for
all your hospitality and
generosity you showed to me during my time in USA.
Before i come back to USA I would like to apply
for admission to dance
school in Geneva.it is private school
(www.geneva-dance-center.ch). I would
like to continue my studies.
It' has an excellant reputation and specialist in
areas beyond classical
ballet. I believe it will help me expand my skills
and give me greater
entree into other areas of dance.I would like to
stay there for few months.
This will be an expensive school for me and housing
prises in Geneva too.
Perhaps you know of someone living in Geneva how has
a space beddroom for
me to use.
I care about your appinion very much. Please,
let me know if you can
help me. I miss you. I hope to see you soon.
